## What's Changed

- Added HDMI 720p as a transcode profile for players that need a lighter stream.
- Added HEVC hardware transcode support for Tube TV and local streams, including NVIDIA, Intel, VAAPI, Apple VideoToolbox, and V4L2 M2M encoder paths where FFmpeg exposes them.
- Added codec-aware Tube TV HLS sessions so H264 and HEVC streams do not collide in the live segment cache.
- Added server clock metadata to the Tube TV lineup API so players can keep channel 01 guide timing synced.
- Improved Tube TV HLS URL generation so profile, codec, and fallback profile requests are carried through every segment.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```
